TextView.android:text:
Hydration Tips

1. Morning Glass
Drink a glass of water immediately after waking up.

2. Flavor with Fruit
Add lemon, cucumber, or mint to make it refreshing.

3. Use a Reusable Bottle
Keep a bottle with you to sip throughout the day.

4. Set Reminders
Use an app or alarm to remind you to drink hourly.

5. Eat Water-Rich Foods
Watermelon, cucumbers, and celery help you stay hydrated.

6. Drink Before Meals
A glass before eating helps digestion and hydration.

7. Replace Soda
Swap sugary drinks with sparkling or plain water.

8. Hydrate After Exercise
Replenish fluids lost through sweat immediately.

9. Monitor Intake
Aim for about 8 glasses (2 liters) daily.

10. Herbal Teas
Unsweetened herbal tea counts toward your daily goal.
